response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks demonstrable leadership in scaling AI systems in regulated fintech environments, has no explicit experience with real-time credit risk or working-capital systems, and his leadership experience is fragmented across startups without clear evidence of building senior technical leadership layers or governing hybrid engineering models at scale.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven ability to build event-driven, scalable systems (GISCollective, DLang microservices)
Strong engineering culture contributions via testing, CI/CD, and knowledge sharing
concerns: No demonstrable production experience in fintech infrastructure or regulated AI systems
Lacks evidence of scaling engineering teams beyond 10–15 people or developing senior technical leaders
No mention of real-time inference, streaming data pipelines, or LLM evaluation pipelines critical to the role
